name: Banana Blueberry Muffins No. 1796
recipeIngredient: 1 cup frozen blueberries, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
2. Cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Mix in the pureed bananas and egg.
4. Combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and lemon peel in a separate bowl.
5. Blend the dry ingredients into the banana mixture by hand until just moistened. Do not over blend.
6. Gently fold in the frozen blueberries.
7. Line large muffin cups with paper liners and coat lightly with vegetable spray.
8. Fill each cup about three-quarters full with the batter.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin tests clean.
This recipe yields approximately 6 muffins.
